name: wonda
description: AI-powered content generation from your terminal — images, video, music, audio, editing, and social publishing

interface.shortDescription: AI marketing automation from the terminal
interface.longDescription: Generate images, videos, music, and speech with 20+ AI models. Edit with CapCut-style captions, transitions, and effects. Publish directly to Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, X, and Reddit. Research competitors at scale. All from a single CLI that AI agents operate natively.
